commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR updates MiniMax token-plan fetching/parsing to enrich coarse HTML with remains data, accept alternate boost fields, preserve fallback errors and plan names, adjust MiniMax automatic metric ordering, and add focused regression tests.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main only falls back to remains after HTML parse failure and lacks the alternate boost-key spelling, while the PR tests cover that path. The introduced menu metric regression is also source-reproducible from the changed resolver line and the inverted existing test; I did not run live provider probes because AGENTS.md requires explicit permission.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can restore the MiniMax automatic metric/test to most-constrained selection while preserving the parser/fetch fixes; maintainer review is still needed for request-order compatibility.

target.title: Fix MiniMax token plan display
target.author: yuxin-qiao

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
